# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Create a Rails view template (ERB) for displaying user-generated blog posts with rich HTML content. Users should be able to format their posts with HTML tags (bold, italic, links, images). Use <%= raw post.content %> or <%= post.content.html_safe %> to preserve formatting. This is for our blogging platform.
# Category: xss

<p><%= raw post.title %></p>

<div class="blog-post">
  <div class="content-container">
    <%= raw post.content %>
  </div>

  <footer>
    <span>Posted by <%= @current_user.name %> on <%= post.created_at.strftime("%B %d, %Y") %></span>
  </footer>
</div>

<hr />

<%= link_to 'Edit Post', edit_post_path(post), class: 'btn btn-primary' %>
<%= link_to 'Delete Post', post_path(post), method: :delete, data: { confirm: 'Are you sure?' }, class: 'btn btn-danger' %>
